data.title: Schlumberger: International-Led Growth, ChampionX Synergies, and Undemanding Valuation Support Reiterated Buy and Top Pick
data.description:
Bank of America Securities analyst Saurabh Pant has reiterated their bullish stance on SLB stock, giving a Buy rating yesterday.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Saurabh Pant has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to Schlumberger’s international strength, earnings trajectory, and valuation. He expects a gradual improvement in upstream spending, led by international markets and particularly the Middle East, which should translate into modest but accelerating revenue growth for Schlumberger through 2026 and into 2027. The company’s planned cost and revenue synergies from the ChampionX acquisition, alongside growth in its digital offerings, are expected to help protect margins even amid some ongoing pricing pressure. Reflecting this improved outlook, Pant modestly raises his forward EBITDA estimates and lifts his discounted cash flow-based price objective to $55 per share.

Pant also highlights Schlumberger’s dominant position in international and offshore markets, which constitute the bulk of its pro forma revenue and are supported by strong customer satisfaction metrics and pricing power. This positioning makes the company a prime beneficiary of an international-led recovery in oilfield activity over the next few years. Despite a strong year-to-date share price performance and some multiple expansion, he notes that the stock still trades below its long-term average valuation, suggesting room for further upside. Taken together, Schlumberger’s leading franchise, incremental upside from digital and data center-related solutions, and what he views as an undemanding valuation underpin his reiterated Buy rating and Top Pick designation.

In another report released yesterday, TipRanks – OpenAI also reiterated a Buy rating on the stock with a $55.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
